server/tests/test_formats.py :: test_parse_output_formats
def test_parse_output_formats() -> None:
    assert parse_output_format("jpg").extension == "jpg"
    assert parse_output_format("jpeg").mime == "image/jpeg"
    assert parse_output_format("png").extension == "png"
    assert parse_output_format("pdf").extension == "pdf"
    assert parse_output_format("gif").mime == "image/gif"
    assert parse_output_format("webp").extension == "webp"
    assert parse_output_format("heic").extension == "heic"
    assert parse_output_format("bmp") is None

server/tests/test_formats.py :: test_decode_png_signature
def test_decode_png_signature() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(8, 8, 5, 10, 15))
    raster = decode_image(payload)
    assert raster.width == 8
    assert raster.height == 8
    assert raster.channels in (3, 4)

server/tests/test_formats.py :: test_decode_jpeg_signature
def test_decode_jpeg_signature() -> None:
    payload = jpeg_bytes(solid_raster(16, 12, 200, 100, 50))
    raster = decode_image(payload)
    assert raster.width >= 16
    assert raster.height >= 12
